result:
Build is fully green — all binaries produced, no errors. Fixed 5 root-cause bugs:

1. `src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `.sec` (wrong struct field name).
2. `wpa_supplicant/config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength()` → `os_strlen()` (undefined function, typo).
3. `src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `sm->pairwise_cipher` (wrong field name).
4. `wpa_supplicant/events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `wpa_s->current_ssid` (wrong field name).
5. `wpa_supplicant/scan.c:1137` — `eloop_register_timeout()` call was missing the trailing `user_data` argument (5th param), added `NULL` to match its prototype.
